FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class NumberBox

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

WinUI NumberBox: an editable numeric EditableText field with an optional spin affix. The numeric model is a caller-owned Value signal (double.NaN = cleared); the visible text is derived from it through the Formatter and re-parsed on commit. Spin buttons step by SmallChange and are Hidden by default. Inline puts the two side-by-side repeat buttons (▲E70E / ▼E70D, NumberBox.xaml:174–175) at the trailing edge of the field; Compact shows the EC8F popup-indicator chevron (NumberBox.xaml:365) and opens the up/down buttons in an Overlay popup while focused (the popup auto-opens on focus and closes on blur — NumberBox.cpp:414–438; the indicator is a non-interactive TextBlock, not a toggle). Keyboard stepping follows OnNumberBoxKeyDown (NumberBox.cpp:533–558): Up/Down = ±SmallChange, PageUp/PageDown = ±LargeChange, handled on key DOWN so OS auto-repeat repeats the step. Validation (clamp / revert) runs on Enter and on blur per ValidationMode; with AcceptsExpression a typed arithmetic expression is evaluated on commit (shunting-yard over + - * / ^ and parentheses — NumberBoxParser port). Mouse-wheel over the field while it is focused also steps ±SmallChange and consumes the event before any enclosing viewport scrolls (PointerWheelChanged → OnNumberBoxScroll, NumberBox.cpp:40 + :578–597).

public sealed class NumberBox : Component

Field Value

string

Formatter

Value → display string (the INumberFormatter2.FormatDouble seam, NumberBox.cpp:644). Default = invariant round-trip after rounding to 10 significant digits (m_displayRounder.SignificantDigits(10), NumberBox.cpp:216 + :643).

public Func<double, string>? Formatter

OnValueChanged

Field Value

Action<double, double>

Parser

Display string → value (the INumberParser.ParseDouble seam, NumberBox.cpp:493–497). Default = invariant double.TryParse (null = parse failure). With AcceptsExpression the expression evaluator runs instead (operands parse invariantly), mirroring NumberBoxParser::Compute.

public Func<string, double?>? Parser

Field Value

Func<string, double?>

PartField

The field row wrapper hosting the InputBox part — the Compact popup's anchor and the Up/Down/PageUp/PageDown stepping host. Owned: OnRealized (anchor capture, chained), OnKeyDown (step keys), Children (the EditableText mount).

public const string PartField = "Field"

Field Value

string

PartSpinButton

One spin RepeatButton — applied to BOTH the inline pair (UpSpinButton/DownSpinButton) and the Compact popup pair (PopupUpSpinButton/PopupDownSpinButton), like WinUI's shared spin-button style. The enabled-state fills are computed per render BEFORE the modifier. Owned: OnClick (step), Repeats (auto-repeat), Role.

public const string PartSpinButton = "SpinButton"

Field Value

string

PartSpinGlyph

The caret glyph TextEl inside each spin button (style via Parts.Set<TextEl>(PartSpinGlyph, …); the state colors are computed before the modifier). Owned: none.

public const string PartSpinGlyph = "SpinGlyph"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract.

public TemplateParts? Parts

Field Value

NumberBox.Style

Text

The WinUI NumberBox.Text property (microsoft.ui.xaml.controls idl): the FORMATTED string, two-way. Caller-owned signal; external (programmatic) writes are validated immediately — OnTextPropertyChanged → UpdateValueToText → ValidateInput (NumberBox.cpp:333–339). Null → an internal signal.

public Signal<string>? Text

Field Value

Signal<string>

Create(Signal<double>?, double, double, double, double, double, NumberBoxSpinButtonPlacementMode, NumberBoxValidationMode, bool, bool, string, string?, string?, float, Func<double, string>?, Action<double, double>?, Signal<string>?, Func<string, double?>?, bool)

Full WinUI-aligned factory.

public static Element Create(Signal<double>? value = null, double initial = NaN, double minimum = -1.7976931348623157E+308, double maximum = 1.7976931348623157E+308, double smallChange = 1, double largeChange = 10, NumberBoxSpinButtonPlacementMode spinButtonPlacementMode = NumberBoxSpinButtonPlacementMode.Hidden, NumberBoxValidationMode validationMode = NumberBoxValidationMode.InvalidInputOverwritten, bool isWrapEnabled = false, bool acceptsExpression = false, string placeholderText = "", string? header = null, string? description = null, float width = 120, Func<double, string>? formatter = null, Action<double, double>? onValueChanged = null, Signal<string>? text = null, Func<string, double?>? parser = null, bool isEnabled = true)

Element

Create(double, double)

Legacy: an editable numeric field with NO spin buttons (WinUI default). step maps to SmallChange.

public static Element Create(double initial = 0, double step = 1)

initial double
step double

Element

Legacy: an editable numeric field with an inline up/down spin column.

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
